scripts.format: biome check src docs __tests__ .github/workflows README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml nx.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts .env.example --write --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false
scripts.format:check: biome check src docs __tests__ .github/workflows README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml nx.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts .env.example --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false
scripts.lint: biome check src docs __tests__ .github/workflows README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml nx.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts .env.example --files-ignore-unknown=true --assist-enabled=false
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
